---
name: Security issue
description: Report a security vulnerability (do not post exploit details publicly)
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["security"]
assignees: ""
---

## Important
**Do not post exploit details or proof-of-concept code in this issue.** See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for how we handle vulnerability reports.

## Your report (high-level only)
- **What:** Brief, non-sensitive description of the issue.
- **Impact:** What could an attacker do? (e.g. "could read local files", "could bypass access control").
- **Environment:** Project version/commit, Python version, OS (no need for step-by-step reproduction here).

## Next steps
- If you have a private channel (e.g. maintainer email) mentioned in SECURITY.md, you may use it for full details.
- Maintainers will acknowledge and coordinate fix and disclosure.
